name: Team WisGOP
subject: WisGOP Update 4.24.2026
body:
No images? [Click here](https://republicanpartyofwisconsin.cmail20.com/t/y-e-ahtmky-didthutlhu-x/) [](https://republicanpartyofwisconsin.cmail20.com/t/y-l-ahtmky-didthutlhu-r/) Patriot,The WisGOP State Convention is only a few weeks away! Republicans from across the state will meet to strategize, build, and unify behind our statewide candidates.Together, we can win in November. Get involved TODAY! Go to [wisgop.org/volunteer](https://republicanpartyofwisconsin.cmail20.com/t/y-l-ahtmky-didthutlhu-y/).-Team WisGOP **" Deal With It": 3 Tax Cuts, All Vetoed** [](https://republicanpartyofwisconsin.cmail20.com/t/y-l-ahtmky-didthutlhu-j/) **Take Action!****We need Letter to the Editor Signers!**
Become a Letter to the Editor (LTE) signer and help get the Republican message out to every community across the state. LTE volunteers are critical to continuing to advance our Republican values. Our goal is to have groups in every county who submit LTEs regularly. These groups will have resources provided from our team, including talking points, draft LTEs, and submission instructions. If you have any questions, please reach out to our Communications Director, Anika Rickard, at [arickard@wisgop.org](mailto:arickard@wisgop.org). [BECOME A LTE SIGNER!](https://republicanpartyofwisconsin.cmail20.com/t/y-l-ahtmky-didthutlhu-t/) **Become a Poll Observer!**
Missed the poll worker deadline? Don't worry, there's still time to become a poll observer. Sign up below! [BECOME A POLL OBSERVER!](https://republicanpartyofwisconsin.cmail20.com/t/y-l-ahtmky-didthutlhu-i/) **Help us bring victories to Republican candidates!**
Campaigns take money, and we need YOUR help to fund campaigns at every level. While Democrats rely on out-of-state billionaires, Republicans are dedicated to the grassroots and the State of Wisconsin. Help us show Democrats that Republicans are the party Wisconsin voters trust by donating TODAY! [DONATE TODAY!](https://republicanpartyofwisconsin.cmail20.com/t/y-l-ahtmky-didthutlhu-d/)
# **Top Shareable Content**
[](https://republicanpartyofwisconsin.cmail20.com/t/y-l-ahtmky-didthutlhu-h/) [](https://republicanpartyofwisconsin.cmail20.com/t/y-l-ahtmky-didthutlhu-k/) [](https://republicanpartyofwisconsin.cmail20.com/t/y-l-ahtmky-didthutlhu-u/)[](https://republicanpartyofwisconsin.cmail20.com/t/y-l-ahtmky-didthutlhu-o/)[](https://republicanpartyofwisconsin.cmail20.com/t/y-l-ahtmky-didthutlhu-b/)[](https://republicanpartyofwisconsin.cmail20.com/t/y-l-ahtmky-didthutlhu-n/)[](https://republicanpartyofwisconsin.cmail20.com/t/y-l-ahtmky-didthutlhu-p/) | [ Share ](https://republicanpartyofwisconsin.cmail20.com/t/y-fb-ahtmky-didthutlhu-m/) | [ Tweet ](https://republicanpartyofwisconsin.cmail20.com/t/y-tw-ahtmky-didthutlhu-a/) | [ Forward ](https://republicanpartyofwisconsin.forwardtomyfriend.com/y-didthutlhu-931243C5-ahtmky-l-e)

Johnson Street | Madison, WI 53703 [Preferences](https://republicanpartyofwisconsin.updatemyprofile.com/y-ahtmky-931243C5-didthutlhu-g) | [Unsubscribe](https://republicanpartyofwisconsin.cmail20.com/t/y-u-ahtmky-didthutlhu-w/)
